prompt: Implement `maxSubarray(nums: number[]): number` that returns the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray (Kadane's algorithm). The array has at least one element.
canonicalSolution: export function maxSubarray(nums: number[]): number { let best = nums[0]!; let cur = nums[0]!; for (let i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { cur = Math.max(nums[i]!, cur + nums[i]!); best = Math.max(best, cur); } return best; }
